gauge.name: Mississippi River below Lock and Dam 5a - Winona

impacts.statement: Water reaches the top of the protective earthen levee.
Water levels reach the flood of record.
Lock and dam 5A closes to navigation.
Water begins to impact campsites along river upstream at Merrick State Park.

properties.caption: Downstream view at Winona Dam 5A, September 11th, 2012
Downstream view at Winona Dam 5A, September 11th, 2012

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued routinely during the navigation season, and as needed at other times of the year.
